content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(0, 8, 6), (8, 9, 6), (5, 9, 7), (0, 9, 8), (1, 6, 8), (1, 3, 9), (4, 6, 12), (2, 5, 13), (0, 4, 19), (7, 9, 19), (1, 5, 22), (7, 8, 25), (6, 9, 26), (5, 8, 27)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 9 exactly at time 7.

First, we will go through each edge and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

* Edge (0, 8, 6) has node 0 and time 6. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (8, 9, 6) has node 8 and time 6. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (5, 9, 7) has node 5 and time 7. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (0, 9, 8) has node 0 and time 8. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (1, 6, 8) has node 1 and time 8. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (1, 3, 9) has node 1 and time 9. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (4, 6, 12) has node 4 and time 12. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (2, 5, 13) has node 2 and time 13. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (0, 4, 19) has node 0 and time 19. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (7, 9, 19) has node 7 and time 19. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (1, 5, 22) has node 1 and time 22. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (7, 8, 25) has node 7 and time 25. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (6, 9, 26) has node 6 and time 26. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (5, 8, 27) has node 5 and time 27. -> Add node 8.

Now we have collected all the nodes that are linked with node 9 at time 7. The answer is: [9, 8, 6, 5, 3, 2, 1].

Answer: [9, 8, 6, 5, 3, 2, 1]
